speech:
Our pricing varies based on service type and vehicle. Here's a general guide: 💰

**Regular Services:**
• Basic Service: ₹500 - ₹1,500
• Full Service: ₹1,500 - ₹3,000
• Oil Change: ₹300 - ₹800

**Emergency Breakdown:**
• Roadside Assistance: ₹800 - ₹2,000
• Towing: Based on distance

Exact pricing is shown when you book. Mechanics may also provide custom quotes after diagnosis.
